user.title: Nextbike Austria
user.description: Pick which nextbike-operated bike-share system to track.

search_station.title: Find a station
search_station.description: Type part of the station name in {system_name} (e.g. "Oper", "Bahnhof").

select_station.title: Select station
select_station.description: Matches for "{query}" in {system_name}. Pick one and set the poll interval.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the nextbike GBFS API. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.no_matches: No stations match your search — try a shorter or different fragment.
error.invalid_station: That station is no longer in the feed. Please pick another.

abort.already_configured: This station is already being tracked.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The picked station does not match this entry's station id. Delete the entry and add the new station instead.

init.title: Nextbike Austria options
init.description:
Update interval controls the per-station polling cadence (60 s minimum).

**Track e-bike battery state** additionally fetches a ~1.3 MB feed every 30 minutes — roughly **63 MB per day / 1.9 GB per month** per opted-in Austrian system. Leave off if your bandwidth is capped.

api_timeout.message: Nextbike GBFS API timed out after {seconds}s

api_invalid_response.message: Nextbike GBFS API returned an unexpected response (status {status}): {error}

station_gone.message: Station {station_id} is no longer published in the {system_id} GBFS feed.

station_gone.title: Nextbike Austria — station missing
station_gone.description: Station **{station_id}** is no longer published by the {system_id} nextbike system tracked by **{entry_title}**. The operator may have retired it. Either the station will come back on its own, or you can remove this entry and pick a different station.
